name: Butterscotch Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar, butter, salt, marshmallow creme, and milk in a heavy saucepan.
2. Cook to rolling boil over medium-low heat.
3. Continue cooking for 5 full minutes, stirring frequently.
4. Remove from heat and stir in butterscotch chips, vanilla, and pecans until chips are melted.
5. Pour into a well-buttered 9x9 inch square pan.
6. Cool and cut into squares.
